title: Wire ConceptModuleLinks into all 11 interactive module components
description: The cross-module link system (40+ concepts mapped in concept-module-map.ts, ConceptModuleLinks rendering component) exists but is NEVER imported by any module component. Only concepts/[slug]/page.tsx uses it. Add ConceptModuleLinks to properties panels or Learn tabs of all modules, connecting the learning experience across the platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Each module's properties panel or Learn tab shows related concepts from other modules
ConceptModuleLinks imported and rendered in OSModule, AlgorithmModule, DatabaseModule, etc.
Clicking a cross-module link navigates to the target module with the relevant concept selected
At least 5 cross-module connections visible per module

title: Wire useProgressStore into all modules — track concept exploration and award XP
description: Progress store tracks XP, streaks, challenge attempts but only InterviewModule uses it. Wire into all modules: simulation run = 10 XP, Compare All = 25 XP, step completion = 50 XP, new concept visit = 15 XP. Streak updates on activity in ANY module.
acceptanceCriteria: Running a simulation in any module awards XP
Progress dashboard shows accurate per-module stats
Streak updates when user is active in ANY module
Activity log entries created for significant actions

title: Wire cross-module bridge UI (RecommendedBridges, BridgePanel) into module properties panels
description: Bridge system (registry, handlers, BridgePanel, RecommendedBridges, BridgeConsumer) is fully built but modules don't render bridge UI. Add RecommendedBridges to properties panels showing contextual suggestions. E.g., LRU in OS → bridge to LRU Cache in Data Structures.
acceptanceCriteria: RecommendedBridges renders in properties panel of all modules
Bridges change based on active concept within the module
Clicking a bridge navigates to target module with payload applied
Breadcrumb shows navigation path

title: Connect PostHog analytics — install SDK, set env var, verify event pipeline
description: PostHog infrastructure is production-grade (analytics.ts, posthog.ts, consent.ts, 14 event types) but not connected. Install posthog-js, set NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY, verify MODULE_VIEWED fires on module switch.
acceptanceCriteria: posthog-js installed
NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY configured
MODULE_VIEWED event fires on module switch
Consent banner appears for new users
PostHog dashboard shows real events

title: Connect Sentry error tracking — install SDK, configure DSN
description: Sentry framework exists (error-tracking.ts with PII scrubbing, breadcrumbs) but is a stub. Install @sentry/nextjs, configure DSN, verify error capture from module renders.
acceptanceCriteria: @sentry/nextjs installed and configured
Module render errors captured in Sentry
PII scrubbing active
Source maps uploaded for production

title: Migrate all modules to shared UI components (Button, Input, Select, Label)
description: 32 shared UI components with CVA variants + Radix primitives exist, but only NetworkingModule imports any. AlgorithmModule, OSModule, DatabaseModule use raw HTML. When global theme updates, modules diverge visually.
acceptanceCriteria: All module buttons use shared Button
All module inputs use shared Input
All module selects use shared Select
Visual consistency verified across all modules

title: Wire motion constants into all module animations — replace raw motion.div with named springs
description: motion.ts defines 5 springs, 100+ named animations. Modules either have zero animation or use raw motion.div defaults. Wire springs.smooth for content entrance, springs.snappy for interactions, stagger.listItems for lists.
acceptanceCriteria: All module content transitions use named springs
No raw motion.div without spring reference in any module
GCPauseLatencyVisualizer uses springs.smooth
Consistent animation feel across all 13 modules

title: Add per-module Suspense fallback skeletons for dynamic module loading
description: All 13 modules loaded with dynamic({ ssr: false }) but NO loading fallback specified. Blank area shown during module switch. App-level loading.tsx exists but only for initial page load.
acceptanceCriteria: Each dynamic module import has a loading component
Skeleton mimics sidebar + canvas + properties layout
Uses animate-pulse matching app-level loading.tsx
Module switch feels instant — skeleton shows immediately

title: Create shared visualization color utility mapping to CSS tokens across all modules
description: globals.css defines chart-1 through chart-6 colors, state colors, node-type colors. But modules define local color arrays (BAR_COLORS, PROCESS_COLORS, THREAD_COLORS, levelColor). Create vizColors utility: vizColors.process(i) → var(--chart-${i}), vizColors.state.success → var(--state-success).
acceptanceCriteria: vizColors utility maps visualization semantics to CSS tokens
All module color arrays refactored to use vizColors
Colors change correctly on theme switch
No hardcoded hex values in any module visualization

title: Add ErrorBoundary wrapping to all module visualizers and simulators
description: ErrorBoundary and ModuleErrorBoundary exist but only wrap system-design nodes. If a visualizer throws (GanttChart, RAG SVG, ThreadSync), error propagates uncaught. Wrap each major visualizer in ErrorBoundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Each major visualizer wrapped in ErrorBoundary
Fallback: 'Visualization error — try refreshing' with retry button
Other panels remain functional during canvas error
Error logged to Sentry when connected
